title: Vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline forms
abstract: The present invention relates to vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline forms, and compositions thereof.
claims:
Claims 1. A crystalline form of vinpocetine hydrochloride selected from the group consisting of (i) vinpocetine hydrochloride Form I having the X-ray powder diffraction pattern having detectable peak(s) at 7.4횂째; 7.6횂째; 8.2횂째; 12.5횂째; and 16.4횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ), (ii) vinpocetine hydrochloride Form II having the X-ray powder diffraction pattern having detectable peak(s) at 6.8횂째; 10.0횂째; 10.2횂째; 10.3횂째; and 20.5횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ), (iii) vinpocetine hydrochloride Form III having the X-ray powder diffraction pattern having detectable peak(s) at 10.3횂째; 13.4횂째; 14.3횂째; 15.5횂째; 20.0횂째; and 20.3횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ), (iv) vinpocetine hydrochloride Form III' having the X-ray powder diffraction pattern having detectable peak(s) at 10.3횂째; 13.0횂째; 15.6횂째; 20.3횂째; 20.6횂째; and 26.9횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ), and (v) vinpocetine hydrochloride Form IV having the X-ray powder diffraction pattern having detectable peak(s) at 10.1 횂째; 10.8횂째; 12.0횂째; 13.1 횂째; and 24.3횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ). 2. The vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline Form I according to claim 1 , characterized by a X-ray powder diffraction (XRPD) pattern having one or more additional detectable peak(s) selected from the peaks at 10.3횂째; 20.9횂째; 22.2횂째; and 22.4횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ), and preferably having one or more additional detectable peak(s) selected from the peaks at 14.9횂째; 19.9횂째; 25.3횂째; and 28.5횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ). 3. The vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline Form II according to claim 1 , characterized by a X-ray powder diffraction (XRPD) pattern having one or more additional detectable peak(s) selected from the peaks at 13.0횂째; 13.6횂째; 15.6횂째; 17.0횂째; and 20.8횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ), and preferably having one or more additional detectable peak(s) selected from the peaks at 15.2횂째; 21.9횂째; and 27.4횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ). 4. The vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline Form II I according to claim 1 , characterized by a X-ray powder diffraction (XRPD) pattern having one or more additional detectable peak(s) selected from the peaks at 13.0횂째; 16.2횂째; 17.0횂째; 17.4횂째; 19.8횂째; and 20.9횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ), and preferably having one or more additional detectable peak(s) selected from the peaks at 14.6횂째; 21 .6횂째; 22.8횂째; 24.2횂째; and 24.6횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ). 5. The vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline Form III' according to claim 1 , characterized by a X-ray powder diffraction (XRPD) pattern having one or more additional detectable peak(s) selected from the peaks at 13.5횂째; 15.7횂째; 15.9횂째; and 17.8횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ), and preferably having one or more additional detectable peak(s) selected from the peaks at 17.0횂째; 21.9횂째; 22.3횂째; 23.0횂째; 23.3횂째; and 24.4횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ). 6. The vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline Form IV according to claim 1 , characterized by a X-ray powder diffraction (XRPD) pattern having one or more additional detectable peak(s) selected from the peaks at 8.9횂째; 18.4횂째; 22.8횂째; and 23.5횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ), and preferably having one or more additional detectable peak(s) selected from the peaks at 13.6횂째; 20.1 횂째; 21 .7횂째; and 25.2횂째 (2-Theta, 횂짹0.1 ). 7. The vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline Form I according to claim 1 , characterized by a DSC profile having an exothermic peak at 135.72횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C with an onset at 130.01 횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C followed by an endothermic peak at 222.20횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C with an onset at 218.29횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C, and preferably substantially as depicted in Figure 6. 8. The vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline Form II I according to claim 1 , characterized by a DSC profile having an endothermic peak at 222.44횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C with an onset at 217.62횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C, and preferably substantially as depicted in Figure 7. 9. The vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline Form III' according to claim 1 , characterized by a DSC profile having an endothermic peak at 216.97횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C with an onset at 21 1 .19횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C, and preferably substantially as depicted in Figure 8. 

 10 The vinpocetine hydrochloride crystalline Form IV according to claim 1 , characterized by a DSC profile having an endothermic peak at 64.33횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C with an onset at 61.20횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C followed by an endothermic peak at 221.00횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C with an onset at 216.71 횂째C 횂짹 1 횂째C, and preferably substantially as depicted in Figure 9. 1 1. A pharmaceutical composition comprising a crystalline form of vinpocetine hydrochloride selected from the group consisting of Form I, Form I I, Form III, Form III', and Form IV, as described in any one of the preceding claims 1 to 10, and at least one pharmaceutically acceptable excipient. 12. A supplement or nutraceutical composition comprising a crystalline form of vinpocetine hydrochloride selected from the group consisting of Form I, Form II, Form III, Form III', and Form IV, as described in any one of the preceding claims 1 to 10, and at least one edible excipient.
